candidate.title: SGLang July 6-7 page-level inference operations signals

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Read the 2026-07-05 through 2026-07-07 scheduled refresh manifest and selected SGLang page snapshots for NIXL, UCX, disaggregated KV transfer, HiCache bootstrap abort cleanup, KV transfer metrics, prefill_kv_transfer_finish_time, Mooncake Store, Ascend 910B3, EAGLE, DP attention, router retry, health check, GLM-5.1, MI350X, TTFT, ITL, benchmark caveat, page-level supplement, and full API refresh caveat terms.
local_checks.wiki_search: Searched SGLang GitHub Closed Issues And PRs, Inference Runtime Infrastructure, Evaluation Observability Reliability Infrastructure, AI Infra Coverage Map, coverage-map.json, loop-state.json, ingest.md, and prior r7/r9/parent-1 manifests. Prior pages already covered SGLang full API corpus through 2026-06-24, scheduled July 1-4 supplement leads, and parent-1 #24456 routed-experts return hot-path diagnosis. The selected #23499, #30053, #23937, #24482, #21210, and #28975 signals were not fully represented as durable rows before this task.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: The ai_infra index already routes to SGLang GitHub Closed Issues And PRs, Inference Runtime Infrastructure, Evaluation Observability Reliability Infrastructure, and AI Infra Coverage Map. No new wiki page was needed; the smallest useful update was to add bounded rows and citations to these existing references.

gap_reason: The inference-runtime layer still had an actionable local-evidence-first gap for high-signal SGLang scheduled crawler snapshots after the API corpus cutoff. The selected page snapshots expose concrete operational behavior, environment, failure mode, metric semantics, or profiling context: NIXL/UCX segfault during disaggregated KV transfer, HiCache bootstrap-queue abort prefetch leak cleanup, wrong KV-transfer metric time window, Ascend 910B3 Mooncake Store buffer-registration failure, EAGLE DP-attention padded-state crash, and MI350X GLM-5.1 sparse-MLA prefill profiling. Promoting these bounded signals improves inference-runtime and eval-observability coverage without claiming full API refresh, joined comments, review comments, production postmortems, SLO thresholds, or general benchmark results.

duplicate_checks.finding: Before this task the page recorded the 2026-07-05 through 2026-07-07 supplement as raw evidence and listed #23499/#30053/#24456 citations, but only #24456 had a durable selected row. Parent-2 adds bounded rows for #23499, #30053, #23937, #24482, #21210, and #28975 and keeps #24456 as a duplicate boundary.

Existing coverage already included vLLM, TensorRT-LLM, Triton, llama.cpp, ONNX Runtime GenAI, Ray Serve, Knative, router abort observability, PD/Mooncake issue leads, startup regressions, and #24456 routed-output hot-path stalls. It did not yet preserve the selected NIXL/UCX, HiCache bootstrap abort, KV metric, Ascend Mooncake Store, EAGLE DP attention, or MI350X sparse-MLA signals.

Existing eval-observability coverage already had OpenTelemetry, LangSmith, Phoenix, Ragas, lm-evaluation-harness, Grafana/Prometheus/Alertmanager, DCGM/Nsight, AMD/Gaudi observability, and blocked retrieval-quality alert evidence. Parent-2 adds only SGLang metric-window semantics and bounded MI350X profiling context, not a production SLO or benchmark baseline.

The inference-runtime layer previously listed #24456 and kept full SGLang API refresh as a possible remaining gap. Parent-2 records selected page-level supplement evidence while preserving the full API refresh caveat.

The existing SGLang runtime known source pointed to the full joined API corpus and older curated pages. Parent-2 adds a separate known source id for the July 6-7 page-level operations evidence to avoid merging it into API corpus counts.

selected_source_backed_signals.promoted_claim: A DeepSeek-R1 FP8 disaggregated prefill+decode benchmark with NIXL transport crashed in UCX CUDA event handling while sending KV chunks; later Gloo and bootstrap errors are consequent scheduler-crash effects.
A merged page snapshot records a narrow fix for bootstrap-queue aborts that leaked prefetch accounting and ongoing_prefetch state until storage prefetch could remain rate-limited for the process.
KV-transfer latency can be overstated if the metric window ends at request completion rather than prefill_kv_transfer_finish_time, because decode time is included in the transfer window.
Mooncake Store buffer registration can fail during scheduler initialization on Ascend 910B3 when NPU host memory is allocated outside Mooncake's registered shared-memory pool.

EAGLE speculative decoding with DP attention and MLP-sync padding can carry stale padded metadata across decode steps, causing a negative-dimension crash and cascading router retry, health check, or training hang symptoms in the reported setup.

selected_source_backed_signals.surface: AMD MI350X GLM-5.1 sparse-MLA prefill profiling
selected_source_backed_signals.promoted_claim: An opt-in Triton FP8 sparse-MLA prefill path for GLM-5.1-MXFP4 on MI350X/gfx950 includes profiler rationale, accuracy check, and TTFT/ITL benchmark tables bounded to the stated setup.

rejected_or_deferred_signals.reason: Already promoted by parent-1 as a routed-experts return hot-path stall diagnosis; reused only as duplicate-boundary evidence.

Not performed in this parent task; the 2026-07-05 through 2026-07-07 scheduled crawler refresh remains page-level supplement evidence and must not be merged into API corpus counts.
